title: WS11 9NR, Reazn UK Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/MP3936UJ/V010
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:   Operator name: Reazn UK Limited Installation name: The Brock Metal Company Permit number: EPR/MP3936UJ/V010  "
